# Base Layer Skin

> Men's skincare engineered for active lifestyles. One product with six clinically-proven active ingredients. Formulated in Breckenridge, Colorado.

## Product
- [Daily Performance Face Cream ($38)](https://baselayerskin.co/face-cream): Advanced men's face moisturizer with niacinamide 5%, copper peptide GHK-Cu, panthenol, centella asiatica, squalane, and hyaluronic acid.

## Ingredients
- [Niacinamide](https://baselayerskin.co/niacinamide)
- [Copper Peptide](https://baselayerskin.co/copper-peptide)
- [Hyaluronic Acid](https://baselayerskin.co/hyaluronic-acid)
- [Squalane](https://baselayerskin.co/squalane)
- [Panthenol](https://baselayerskin.co/panthenol)
- [Centella Asiatica](https://baselayerskin.co/centella-asiatica)

## Skin Concerns
- [Oily Skin](https://baselayerskin.co/oily-skin-men)
- [Dry Skin](https://baselayerskin.co/dry-dehydrated-skin-men)

- [Post-Shave Irritation](https://baselayerskin.co/post-shave-irritation)
- [Dark Circles](https://baselayerskin.co/dark-circles-men)
